name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Servflow

labels: enhancement

---

## Feature Description
<!-- What feature would you like to see added? -->

## Problem It Solves
<!-- What challenge or pain point would this address? -->

## Use Case
<!-- How would you use this feature in your workflow? -->

## Example Scenario
<!-- Provide a concrete example of when you'd use this -->

## Proposed Solution (Optional)
<!-- Any ideas on how this could work? -->

## Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Critical for my use case

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features -->
